summary: Merge-bundle PR that lands several decompiled functions across fighter, menu, library, toy, audio, THP, ARQ, and baselib spline areas; updates related structs, prototypes, includes, symbols, and marks sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c as Matching. The slice has no PR body, issue comments, review comments, or explicit build/objdiff evidence.

key_files.role: Renamed spline .sdata2 symbols from HSD_Spline_804DE62x-style names to @number local-label-style names for addresses 0x804DE620 through 0x804DE654.
Changed sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c object classification from NonMatching to Matching.
Recovered fields in ftCommon_MotionVars.unk_deadup: x4C float, x50 Vec3, x5C Vec3.
Implemented Kirby special-N functions ftKb_SpecialN_800F10D4, ftKb_SpecialN_800F19AC, and ftKb_SpecialN_800F1A8C; one implementation uses a scoped dont_inline pragma and PAD_STACK.
Implemented ftCo_DeadUpFall_Phys and ftCo_800D5600; added includes for ftanim, lbvector, and mpcoll.
Added prototype for fn_800D54A4.
Implemented gm_80164504 stage-unlock/notification logic using stage lookup tables and gmMainLib calls.
Implemented lbArq_80014D2C initialization for lbArq global lists and nodes, with PAD_STACK.
Implemented fn_800244F4 audio-global reset routine and added gm_1601 include.
Updated fn_800244F4 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void fn_800244F4(void).
Added static/extern audio globals used by fn_800244F4.
Implemented fn_8001EB14 THP init/header-read routine, including THPInit, DVDConvertPathToEntrynum, lbFile read, OSReport warnings, and state-field initialization.
Expanded THPDecComp layout, declared THPInit, and updated fn_8001EB14 prototype to s32 fn_8001EB14(THPDecComp*, const char*).
Implemented fn_8024FC48 data-delete menu logic and added mnmainrule include.
Implemented mn_802307F8 rule-menu text update logic and declared local externs.
Added struct mn_802307F8_t and updated mn_802307F8 prototype.
Implemented mnNameNew_8023B224 name-entry exit/transition routine and added relevant includes/extern.
Updated mnNameNew_8023B224 prototype to void mnNameNew_8023B224(u8).
Expanded TyCameraData_ fields and implemented un_80307828 camera/light reset logic, using HSD_CObjSetInterest and PAD_STACK.
Updated un_80307828 prototype return type to void.
Adjusted helper linkage/inlining and refactored splArcLengthGetParameter with a static spl_GetArcLengthDx helper; associated with spline.c becoming Matching.
Removed splGetBSplinePoint declaration after making it static in spline.c.

what_changed: Replaced multiple placeholder comments of the form /// #symbol with C implementations in fighter, game-mode, lb, menu, toy, and baselib code.
Updated headers to expose recovered function signatures and structs instead of UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for several functions.
Recovered typed struct/union fields where implementations needed named offsets, including ftCommon_MotionVars.unk_deadup, THPDecComp, TyCameraData_, and mn_802307F8_t.
Adjusted includes to use functions/types required by the new bodies, such as ftanim, lbvector, mpcoll, lbfile, dvd, menu, and gm headers.
Changed sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py and changed related spline helper linkage/inlining and sdata2 symbol names.

smart_moves.text: Function bodies were paired with header prototype cleanup where the recovered signatures were visible, reducing reliance on UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
Recovered fields replaced larger opaque padding regions in structs/unions when new implementations accessed those offsets.
The spline matching-status change was accompanied by source/linkage changes and symbols.txt metadata updates rather than only flipping configure.py.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves a function signature, update the owning header at the same time so callers no longer depend on UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.

Adding named fields to local structs/unions can make recovered bodies express offset accesses more directly than leaving broad padding, but field semantics remain provisional when names are still xNN/unk_NN.
For file-local helper recovery, adjust header visibility when a helper becomes static; spline.c makes splGetBSplinePoint static and removes its public declaration.

naming_conventions.text: Unproven functions and fields retain address-style or xNN/unk_NN names, e.g. fn_800244F4, fn_8001EB14, mn_802307F8_t, x4C, x50, and unk_128.
Clear local role names are used for common object pointers such as fp, gobj, jobj, text, data, global, nodes, and node.
Spline sdata2 symbols were reverted from semantic HSD_Spline_804DE62x names to @number labels, suggesting the slice did not retain semantic names for those constants.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: A scoped #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop block was used around ftKb_SpecialN_800F10D4.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR slice contains no objdiff/build explanation for why dont_inline was required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: PAD_STACK appears in ftKb_SpecialN_800F10D4, lbArq_80014D2C, mnNameNew_8023B224, and un_80307828.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice shows tactic use but no verifier evidence; keep as PR-specific observation, not a general endorsement.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: spline.c matching involved linkage/inlining edits, including inline splGetCardinalPoint/splGetBezierPoint, static splGetBSplinePoint/splArcLengthPolynomial, and adding static spl_GetArcLengthDx.
gm_80164504 uses goto labels found_stage and found_notify to structure two lookup loops before setting unlock state and notifications.

No review comments, issue comments, or review records are present in the slice.
No explicit build, objdiff, checkdiff, or CI validation output is included, so match status is only evidenced by configure.py changing spline.c to Matching and by the merged PR metadata.
This PR is a merge bundle for #2366, #2367, and #2368; individual rationale may exist in those source PRs but is not present in this slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered bodies should drive owning-header prototype cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR repeatedly pairs new function bodies with header signature updates from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures, e.g. fn_800244F4(void), fn_8001EB14(THPDecComp*, const char*), mnNameNew_8023B224(u8), and un_80307828(int).

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use recovered struct fields to support matched bodies, but keep uncertain field names conservative
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR recovers fields in ftCommon_MotionVars.unk_deadup, THPDecComp, TyCameraData_, and mn_802307F8_t while retaining xNN/unk_NN names where semantics are not proven.

source_update_candidates.title: sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c became Matching in PR #2369
source_update_candidates.text: configure.py changes Object(NonMatching, "sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c") to Object(Matching, "sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c") in this merged PR. The slice also includes spline.c and spline.h source/linkage changes plus symbols.txt changes around spline sdata2 constants.
source_update_candidates.reason: Path fact candidate because the configure.py diff directly changes the matching classification; curator should verify against current source/path-fact policy before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate whether source PRs #2366/#2367/#2368 contain missing verification evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2369 is titled "Merge #2366, #2367, #2368" and has no body or review comments in this slice. Individual source PRs may contain rationale, review feedback, or build/objdiff evidence absent here.
source_update_candidates.reason: Avoid treating this merge-bundle slice as complete rationale for all included decomp work.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK or dont_inline use from this PR as an accepted tactic; the slice shows uses but contains no objdiff/build evidence explaining necessity.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale or requested changes; there are no review comments or review records in the slice.
Do not claim every implemented function matched individually; only spline.c has an explicit configure.py Matching status change in the loaded evidence.
Do not treat the HSD_Spline_804DE62x-to-@number symbols.txt change as a global naming rule without additional symbol/source ownership evidence.
